message:
feat(fcp-bootstrap): certificate selection and provisioning handoff types br-24llg.4.2.2

Add certificate/key enumeration, matching by CKA_ID, deterministic
selection (Ed25519 > X25519 > ECDSA), and typed ProvisioningMaterial
handoff boundary. Extended HardwareTokenSessionDriver trait with
enumerate_certificates/enumerate_keys. 636 unit + 61 integration tests
pass, clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
